title: Infosys Recognized as a Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Public Cloud IT Transformation Services
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that it was positioned as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Public Cloud IT Transformation Services for the third consecutive year. The release links the recognition to Infosys Cobalt and its cloud-native professional and managed services capabilities, including cloud innovation and enterprise automation.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was positioned as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Public Cloud IT Transformation Services.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Positioned as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner ®  Magic Quadrant ™  for Public Cloud IT Transformation Services for the Third Consecutive Year

key_facts.fact: This was the third consecutive year Infosys received the Leader positioning in this Gartner Magic Quadrant.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Positioned as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner ®  Magic Quadrant ™  for Public Cloud IT Transformation Services for the Third Consecutive Year
